site.legalDescription: Lot 49, University View Estates Unit No. 2, Map No. 004985, City of San Diego, County of San Diego, State of California
site.notes: TBD - A: Lot is irregular 5-sided polygon (~55x100), 5,509 SF -- legal nonconforming under RS-1-7 (min 7,000 SF). Verify dims via assessor tract map (Map 4985). | TBD - B: Existing house 1,066 SF, 3bd/1.5ba, built 1963. | TBD - C: baseFAR 0.6, setbacks 15/13/5 from RS-1-7 defaults. Clairemont plan update Dec 2025 may affect -- verify current code. | TBD - D: Airport YES (MCAS Miramar Review Area 1, 60-65 CNEL + Montgomery Field Review Area 2). Very High Fire Hazard YES (300 ft brush buffer). Height limit 30 ft (Clairemont Mesa overlay O-22048). | TBD - E: NEF, DIF, affordability -- City DSD Fee Schedule. | TBD - F: Project type, architect, scope. | TBD - G: Inspector contacts.

planningAreas.name: CCHS (HOUSING SOLUTIONS)
planningAreas.val: Not in CCHS — RS-1-7 residential zone is not a CCHS-eligible commercial corridor zone. CCHS applies to CC, CN, CV, and certain mixed-use zones per SD Ord. 21866. Source: SDMC §143.0710; SD Planning (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: TRANSIT PRIORITY AREA (TPA)
planningAreas.val: Not in TPA — Palmyra Ave is an interior residential street in Clairemont Mesa. No MTS/NCTD rapid bus or rail within 0.5 mi. Standard residential parking applies. Source: MTS route map; SDMTS.com (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: PARKING STANDARDS (PSTPA)
planningAreas.val: Not in PSTPA — no TPA designation; standard RS-1-7 parking applies (2 spaces per unit). Source: SDMC §142.0528 (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: MOBILITY CHOICES
planningAreas.val: -- TBD: SD Municipal Code Appendix A Fig A-1

overlayZones.name: TRANSIT AREA OVERLAY
overlayZones.val: No — interior Clairemont Mesa residential; no TAOZ designation. Source: SD Zoning Data Portal (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: AIRPORT INFLUENCE AREA
overlayZones.val: YES -- MCAS Miramar Review Area 1 (60-65 CNEL) + Montgomery Field Review Area 2

overlayZones.name: VERY HIGH FIRE HAZARD
overlayZones.val: YES -- within 300 ft brush zone buffer
